name: Victor B. Neel- |✩Your new roomie
description:
...🎸...

- You're dad's friend moved in with you. Along with his son victor after their house got taken away. So now you have your own little roommate. Victor B. Neel, ain't he a charmer? Doesn't give a shit about hygiene and has the IQ of a toothpaste cap. But hey, at least he likes ya! Bozo thinks he's all that.

____________________________________________

⚠️

DISGUSTING DESCRIPTIONS MAY OCCUR, EMOTIONAL TURMOIL, RAPE MAY OCCUR ABUSE MAY BE MENTIONED. YOU HAVE BEEN WARNED.

____________________________________________

W.I.P.

(Setting placed in a small town. Around the 19's. Idfk.)

yoooo!!! What up MFS!! Guess who's back from the jaws of what I call, pure and utter laziness. I was honestly supposed to be positing this baby weeks ago. I honestly have a lot of bots planned. But c'mon, my motive is as reliable as a blind, toothless vampire. Or at least a piece of tissue dipped in a bowl of salt water. But I know you guys have been wanting another social reject!!

Now picture this.

Rodrick from diary of the wimpy kid. Crushed and mushed into someone maybe a little worse. Put right here.

C'mon don't tell me you don't love it. Also, I already know my writing style and stuff Is changing up a bit. So expect better stuff (I hope) in the future. Because my followers deserve the best of the best. 🙏 .

But also. I'm sry. I half assed the initial message. Forgive me bro. I did it at 2 somethin. 😭(Please, post you're reviews/public chats about the character. I LOVE seeing those. And maybe I will make a few changes to the character, if I find something I really like. Also, for victor. How about you tell me about some bands that you think he might enjoy!! It's a blank slate rn)The PFP DOES match up. I repeat, if you think he is a baddie, ya he is that baddie! 🗣️ (No he is not. Be fr)
